discoveries: dialog-select-mcp.tsx has 261 uncommitted lines for enhanced MCP UI but only supports remote servers and delete=disconnect
NO MCP-specific IPC channels exist in Electron layer
SDK client (sdk.client.mcp.*) used exclusively via HTTP to sidecar
MCP add() is in-memory only, not persisted to config file
MCP Server Interface lacks remove() and update() methods
dialog-manage-agents.tsx is the CRUD management pattern to follow
MCP config schema supports Local (command) and Remote (URL) types with OAuth
